# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

function generateReport() {
    $dbHost = 'localhost';
    $dbName = 'your_database';
    $dbUser = 'your_username';
    $dbPass = 'your_password';

    try {
        $pdo = new PDO("mysql:host=$dbHost;dbname=$dbName", $dbUser, $dbPass);
        $pdo->setAttribute(PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE, PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION);

        $filters = array_filter($_POST);
        $conditions = array();
        $params = array();

        if (!empty($filters)) {
            foreach ($filters as $key => $value) {
                if ($key == 'status' && !empty($value)) {
                    $conditions[] = "status = :$key";
                    $params[":$key"] = $value;
                } elseif ($key == 'category' && !empty($value)) {
                    $conditions[] = "category = :$key";
                    $params[":$key"] = $value;
                } elseif ($key == 'start_date' && !empty($value) && isset($_POST['end_date']) && !empty($_POST['end_date'])) {
                    $conditions[] = "date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date";
                    $params[':start_date'] = $_POST['start_date'];
                    $params[':end_date'] = $_POST['end_date'];
                }
            }

            $sql = "SELECT * FROM reports WHERE 1=1";
            if (!empty($conditions)) {
                $sql .= " AND " . implode(" AND ", $conditions);
            }
        } else {
            $sql = "SELECT * FROM reports";
        }

        $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
        $stmt->execute($params);

        $results = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

        return $results;
    } catch (PDOException $e) {
        die("Error: " . $e->getMessage());
    }
}

// Example usage
$reportData = generateReport();
print_r($reportData);
?>
